accounting-finance.title: Accounting & Finance
descriptionParagraphs: Ongoing Accounting & Finance support for your business – from bookkeeping to senior financial oversight.
VACEI manages accounting, reporting, and CFO support so your numbers stay accurate, timely, and clear.
Work is fully managed by VACEI and delivered through your client portal.

featuresSection.title: What we cover in Accounting & Finance
featuresSection.subtitle: Request a tailored quote based on your accounting, reporting, and CFO needs.

features.title: CFO & fractional CFO
items: Financial readiness for audit, banking, or investment
Ongoing coordination with accounting and compliance functions

tax-compliance.title: Tax & Compliance
descriptionParagraphs: Ongoing support for your business tax, payroll, and statutory filings.
VACEI manages VAT, payroll, registrations, and key deadlines so obligations are handled correctly and on time.
Everything is coordinated through your client portal for clear tracking and peace of mind.

featuresSection.title: Complete tax and compliance management
featuresSection.subtitle: Get a quote based on your VAT, payroll, and filing requirements

features.title: VAT Services
items: EC Sales List and Intrastat reporting

features.title: Regulatory Filings
items: Annual return submissions to Registry of Companies

audit-assurance.title: Audit & Assurance
descriptionParagraphs: Audit and Assurance services cover statutory audits and structured financial reviews.
VACEI delivers audits through a clear, organised process that provides visibility, predictable timelines and documented outcomes.
Audit work is coordinated by VACEI and supported by structured workflows through the platform, minimizing disruption to your operations.

featuresSection.title: Structured audit and assurance services
featuresSection.subtitle: Request a quote based on your audit requirements and engagement scope

corporate-csp-services.title: Corporate & CSP Services
descriptionParagraphs: Ongoing corporate services for Malta companies, including registered office and statutory support.
VACEI keeps your company maintained, compliant, and documented throughout the year.
All work is delivered through a structured process and client portal.

featuresSection.title: What we cover in Corporate & CSP Services
featuresSection.subtitle: Request a tailored quote based on the level of corporate administration required.

features.title: CSP core services
items: Director services (natural person / corporate director where applicable)
Nominee director / nominee shareholder services (where applicable)

features.title: Governance & statutory maintenance
items: MBR filings support (Annual Return A1 and statutory forms)
Company documentation maintenance (resolutions, share certificates, core statutory documents)

features.title: Optional add-ons
items: Certified true copies and apostille coordination
Bank liaison support (KYC coordination and confirmations)

regulated-licensing.title: Regulated & Licensing
descriptionParagraphs: Support for businesses that operate in regulated environments or require formal licences.
VACEI manages licence applications, renewals, and key regulatory submissions with authorities.
Work is delivered through clear, structured workflows.

featuresSection.title: Regulated & licensing support
featuresSection.subtitle: Request a quote based on your licensing and regulatory requirements.

advisory-growth.title: Advisory & Growth
descriptionParagraphs: Advisory & Growth support for businesses beyond day-to-day compliance.
VACEI helps you plan, grow, and navigate key decisions with financial and regulatory aspects aligned.
Work is delivered alongside your core accounting, tax, corporate, and audit setup for consistency.

featuresSection.title: Advisory & growth services
featuresSection.subtitle: Request a quote or discuss advisory and growth support for your business.

features.title: Grants & funding
items: Grant eligibility assessment and application support

features.title: Projects & transactions support
items: Structuring support aligned with regulatory and financial requirements (with external legal advisors where required)

company-structure-corporate-changes.title: Company Structure & Corporate Changes
descriptionParagraphs: Project-based support for changes to your company’s legal, ownership, or management structure.
VACEI prepares documentation, coordinates filings, and ensures each change is compliant and properly recorded.
This is separate from ongoing Corporate (CSP) Services and handled as a defined project.

featuresSection.title: What we cover in Company Structure & Corporate Changes
featuresSection.subtitle: Request a quote based on the specific corporate change or project.

features.title: Ownership & capital changes
items: Share capital increases, reductions, and reclassifications

features.title: Management & company details
items: Amendments to company objects or memorandum

liquidation-wind-down.title: Liquidation & Wind-Down
descriptionParagraphs: Support for companies that are closing, restructuring, or no longer operating.
VACEI manages the liquidation or wind-down process so statutory requirements and filings are completed correctly.

featuresSection.title: Complete liquidation and wind-down services
featuresSection.subtitle: Request a quote based on the type of liquidation or wind-down required

international-business-structuring-expan.title: International Business Structures
descriptionParagraphs: Support for designing and managing international business structures.
VACEI helps you set up and coordinate group structures, entities, and banking in a compliant, tax-aware way.
Work is coordinated through the VACEI portal so you can see and manage cross-border structures in one place.

featuresSection.title: Our international structuring services
featuresSection.subtitle: Discuss your international structure or request a quote through one controlled portal.

features.title: Group & holding structures
items: Profit flow and dividend planning within legal frameworks
Clear documentation and defensible rationale for all structures

features.title: International incorporation & expansion
items: Coordination with local advisors where required
Central management of new entities within the wider group structure

features.title: Banking & payments support
items: Introductions to EU and international banks
Support for complex or previously rejected banking applications
Banking support integrated with group structure and compliance

features.title: Cross-border tax & compliance
items: International tax coordination across group entities
VAT registrations and ongoing VAT compliance
Holistic planning so tax, operations and reporting stay aligned

features.title: Ongoing group management
items: Structures kept manageable, transparent, and compliant as you grow

crypto-digital-assets.title: Crypto & Digital Assets
descriptionParagraphs: Support for structuring, banking, and compliance around crypto and digital asset activity.
VACEI helps you align crypto holdings with lawful tax structuring, banking access, and compliance requirements.

featuresSection.title: Crypto & digital asset structuring services
featuresSection.subtitle: Discuss your crypto structure or request a quote using the same secure process.

features.title: Crypto structuring & wealth
items: Review how crypto assets are currently held
Assess personal, company, and group-level structuring
Separate trading, investment, and operational activities
Design structures for lawful tax efficiency and risk management
Align crypto holdings with residence, substance, and governance requirements

features.title: Crypto–fiat banking & cash-out
items: Assess crypto activity, transaction history, and risk profile
Prepare clients for bank or EMI onboarding
Support documentation, explanations, and compliance readiness
Introduce suitable EU and international banks or EMIs
Assist with structuring crypto to fiat conversion flows and ongoing banking support

features.title: Accounting, tax & compliance
items: Accounting treatment of crypto assets and transactions
Tax reporting aligned with applicable rules and classifications
Audit coordination where crypto exposure exists
Documentation and record keeping suitable for future review

audit-readiness.title: Audit Readiness
descriptionParagraphs: Preparation support so your records and documentation are ready before the audit starts.
VACEI reviews records, documentation, and processes so audits are smoother, faster, and less disruptive.

featuresSection.title: What we cover in audit readiness
featuresSection.subtitle: Prepare for audit using one structured process coordinated through the VACEI portal.

features.title: Financial records
items: Review of bookkeeping and accounting records
Assessment of period-end adjustments and balances
Identification of gaps, inconsistencies, or unsupported figures
Alignment between trial balance, management accounts, and statutory formats
Financial data made complete, consistent, and ready for audit review

features.title: Documentation & evidence
items: Review of supporting documentation for key balances
Mapping of evidence to financial statement line items
Identification of missing or weak support
Reduced time spent responding to audit queries and follow‑ups

features.title: Corporate & compliance alignment
items: Review of statutory and corporate records
Alignment of share capital, ownership, and governance documentation
Confirmation of consistency between corporate records and financial statements
Early resolution of common corporate vs financial misalignments

features.title: Internal controls & process
items: High-level review of accounting and approval processes
Identification of control gaps affecting audit risk
Practical recommendations to strengthen documentation and approval trails
Focus on changes that reduce audit issues, not theoretical controls

features.title: Pre-audit issue resolution
items: Identification of potential audit findings in advance
Support in resolving issues before audit fieldwork
Coordination with management on corrective actions
Documentation of resolutions for audit reference

group-consolidation.title: Group & Consolidation
descriptionParagraphs: Group & Consolidation support for businesses with multiple entities.
VACEI coordinates group reporting, intercompany alignment, and consolidation so information is consistent and usable.

featuresSection.title: What we cover in group & consolidation
featuresSection.subtitle: Discuss group reporting or request a quote for group-level support.

features.title: Group structure & reporting
items: Review of group structure and entity relationships
Alignment of accounting policies across entities
Consistent, repeatable approach to group reporting

features.title: Intercompany accounting
items: Identification of intercompany transactions and balances
Coordination of intercompany agreements and flows
Reconciliation of intercompany balances across entities
Clear intercompany tracking to support audits and lenders

features.title: Group consolidation
items: Elimination of intercompany balances and transactions
Consolidation across multiple currencies where applicable
Consolidation outputs aligned with underlying entity data

features.title: Ongoing group oversight
items: Periodic group-level review of entity reporting
Coordination with local accounting teams or advisors
Continuous improvement of group reporting processes

banking-payments-support.title: Banking & Payments Support
descriptionParagraphs: Support for accessing and maintaining reliable banking and payment solutions.
VACEI prepares documentation, coordinates onboarding, and supports ongoing banking and payments requirements.

featuresSection.title: What we cover in banking & payments support
featuresSection.subtitle: Discuss banking support or request a quote using one structured process.

features.title: Banking readiness
items: Review of business activity, structure, and risk profile
Assessment of banking challenges or prior rejections
Identification of suitable banking or payment routes
Alignment of business model with banking expectations
Realistic positioning before any applications are made

features.title: Bank & EMI introductions
items: Introductions to EU and international banks
Introductions to electronic money institutions and fintech providers
Introductions based on suitability and jurisdiction (approvals remain at bank discretion)

features.title: Documentation & compliance
items: Preparation of KYC and onboarding documentation
Coordination of business explanations and supporting narratives
Alignment of corporate, accounting, and tax documentation
Support for responding to follow-up queries from institutions
Well‑prepared documentation to improve onboarding efficiency

features.title: Payment flows & operations
items: Structuring of incoming and outgoing payment flows
Ongoing support for operational banking requirements

features.title: Banking compliance support
items: Support with periodic bank reviews and updates
Assistance with changes to activity or structure
Ongoing documentation maintenance to reduce account risk

corporate-transactions.title: Corporate Transactions
descriptionParagraphs: Support for defined corporate transactions such as ownership changes, restructurings, and other one-off events.
VACEI coordinates documentation, filings, and stakeholders so each transaction is executed accurately and clearly.

featuresSection.title: What we cover in corporate transactions
featuresSection.subtitle: Discuss a corporate transaction or request a quote for a defined project.

features.title: Ownership & shareholding
items: Share transfers between individuals or entities
All ownership changes documented, filed, and aligned with records

features.title: Corporate changes & amendments
items: Changes to company name or registered details
Amendments to company objects or memorandum
Updates to governance and control structures
Consistency maintained across statutory, accounting, and compliance records

features.title: Restructuring & strategic transactions
items: Preparation for mergers, acquisitions, or disposals
Coordination alongside external legal and tax advisors where required

features.title: Transaction coordination
items: Preparation and review of corporate documentation
Liaison with advisors, shareholders, and counterparties
Tracking of transaction milestones and completion steps

shared.ctaBody: Get started with VACEI today and experience the difference of a structured delivery platform.

bookkeeping.pageDescription: Outsource your bookkeeping in Malta. VACEI gives Malta businesses real-time visibility over their finances, with a dedicated bookkeeping team.

hero.eyebrow: Bookkeeping for Malta businesses — one platform
hero.title: Outsource Your Bookkeeping in Malta —
hero.subtitle: VACEI gives Malta businesses real-time visibility over their finances, with a dedicated bookkeeping team handling the work behind the scenes.
hero.ctaHint: Create your account, access your portal, and request your tailored quote in minutes.

trust.item2: Dedicated bookkeeping team assigned to you
trust.item4: Supported by A4 Services, established Malta accountants

whatIsVacei.title: A simple way to understand VACEI
whatIsVacei.subtitle: VACEI combines a dedicated bookkeeping team with a powerful client portal — giving you full visibility over your financial position.
whatIsVacei.teamTitle: We handle everything. You focus on your business.
whatIsVacei.teamDesc: Your dedicated bookkeeping team manages the work behind the scenes — bookkeeping, reconciliations, VAT support, management accounts, and ongoing financial tasks.
whatIsVacei.teamList1Desc: Every transaction recorded and reconciled, ongoing.
whatIsVacei.teamList2Desc: Accounts reconciled regularly so your figures stay accurate.
whatIsVacei.teamList3Desc: VAT reporting, preparation, and compliance requirements.
whatIsVacei.teamList4Desc: Clear monthly insights that explain your performance.
whatIsVacei.portalDesc: Log in at any time and see what your business is owed, what it owes, your bank balances, VAT position, tasks, and progress. No emails. No waiting.
whatIsVacei.portalList1Desc: Your real-time financial position, always updated.
whatIsVacei.portalList2Desc: Receivables, payables, and bank — all in one place.
whatIsVacei.portalList3Desc: See VAT position and upcoming obligations clearly.
whatIsVacei.portalList4Desc: Message your bookkeeping team without leaving the portal.
whatIsVacei.combinedDesc: A managed bookkeeping service with real-time visibility over your business.
whatIsVacei.combinedQuote: "They handle everything, and I can see everything."

video.title: See how VACEI works in practice
video.desc: Understand how your bookkeeping is managed, how your portal works, and how you gain full visibility over your Malta business finances.
video.point1: See how documents are uploaded and processed
video.point2: Understand how your dashboard gives real-time visibility
video.point3: View how tasks and communication are handled
video.point4: Learn how your dedicated bookkeeping team manages everything
video.note: This is not a demo — it's how your bookkeeping will be managed.

features.title2: A clearer way to manage your finances.
features.desc: VACEI combines a dedicated bookkeeping team with a structured client portal — giving you visibility over your financial position at all times. No chasing updates. No waiting for reports.
features.card1Desc: Every transaction recorded, reconciled, and maintained accurately — ongoing.
features.card2Desc: Clear monthly insights that explain your financial performance.
features.card3Desc: Support with VAT reporting, preparation, and Malta compliance requirements.
features.card4Desc: Access receivables, payables, balances, and trends — all in one place.
features.card5Desc: Accounts reconciled regularly so your figures stay accurate and up to date.
features.card6Desc: A team assigned to your Malta business, familiar with your numbers and available when needed.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to better bookkeeping
howItWorks.desc: No lengthy onboarding. No complex forms. No unnecessary calls.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Tell us about your Malta business and what you need — receive a tailored proposal directly in your portal.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your bookkeeping team is assigned and your setup begins.

portalVisibility.title: Everything you need to know — always available
portalVisibility.desc: No more waiting for reports. No more uncertainty. Log in and see your Malta business finances in real time.
portalVisibility.tagline: Clear. Structured. Always up to date.

pricing.title: Choose the right level of support
pricing.desc: Start with bookkeeping, add reconciliations and reporting when you need them, or outsource your finance function through one structured platform.
pricing.notes1: All packages include access to your VACEI portal, where you can upload documents, track tasks, communicate with your team, and view your financial position.
pricing.notes2: Final pricing depends on transaction volume, number of bank accounts, VAT complexity, payroll, catch-up work, and reporting requirements.
pricing.notes3: For Malta clients, VACEI is supported by A4 Services, an established audit and accounting firm in Malta.
pricing.ctaTitle: Not sure which package fits best?
pricing.ctaDesc: Create your account, request a quote, and we'll recommend the right level of support for your business.

pkg0.label: Bookkeeping Essentials
pkg0.title: Bookkeeping Essentials
pkg0.desc: For businesses that need bookkeeping handled properly and consistently.
pkg0.bestFor: Small businesses that want clean records without full accounting support.

pkg1.label: Core Accounting Package
pkg1.title: Core Accounting Package
pkg1.desc: For businesses that want more than bookkeeping — accurate books, reconciled balances, and real-time visibility over their financial position.
pkg1.bestFor: Businesses that want accurate books, reconciled balances, and better visibility.

pkg2.label: Management Accounts Package
pkg2.title: Management Accounts Package
pkg2.desc: For businesses that want regular management accounts and clearer financial performance reporting.
pkg2.bestFor: Growing businesses that want clarity over performance and financial position.

pkg3.label: Managed Finance Function
pkg3.title: Managed Finance Function
pkg3.desc: For businesses that want to outsource part or all of their finance function.
pkg3.bestFor: Companies that want a complete outsourced finance function without building an internal team.
pkg3.inc4: P&L, balance sheet and cash flow reporting

credibility.title: Supported by A4 Services
credibility.p1: For Malta clients, VACEI is supported by A4 Services, an established audit and accounting firm in Malta.
credibility.p2: This brings professional oversight, local experience, and familiarity with Malta compliance requirements — while VACEI remains your main portal and service experience.

testimonial.quote: "I finally know exactly where my business stands, every single day. VACEI removed the guesswork and gave me back hours every week."
testimonial.author: — Malta Business Owner

finalCta.eyebrow: No commitment required. Start your setup in minutes.
finalCta.title: Ready to take control of your bookkeeping?
finalCta.desc: Create your account, access your portal, and request your tailored quote — all in minutes.
